---
name: It worked!
about: You used the guide to write a paper that got into *ACL — tell us about it
title: 'success: <short note>'
labels: success
assignees: ''
---

## Tell us about it

You do not have to give details if you'd rather not. The maintainers just want to know the guide is helping people.

- **Venue and year (optional):** (e.g. ACL 2026, EMNLP 2025 Findings)
- **Was it your first first-authored \*ACL paper?**
- **Which chapter(s) helped most?**
- **Anything we should add or change?**

## OK to mention in the README?

- [ ] Yes, you can quote me anonymously in the acknowledgments / a "success stories" section.
- [ ] Yes, you can credit me by name.
- [ ] No — just wanted you to know.
